name: Bhutan's Bible
description:
Bhutan's Bible is designed specifically for Bhutan. Come and read the Christian Scriptures in Dzongkha and Nepali.
*Brand new AI assistant is designed to help you get the most out of your readings
*Dzongkha currently has Genesis, Exodus, Numbers, Deuteronomy, Joshua, Ruth, 1 and 2 Chronicles, Ezra, Nehemiah, Psalms, Proverbs, Ezekiel, Daniel, Jonah, and the New Testament. More Scriptures will be added as they are translated.
*Nepali features the Nepali Contemporary Version (entire Bible) in Devanagari script.

Features
- Use the AI assistant to help you understand the passage, develop group study questions, even plan the outline of a talk
- Listen to the Dzongkha audio recording of Genesis, Ruth, Psalms, Proverbs, Jonah, and the New Testament while following along in the Scripture text.
- Listen to the Nepali audio recording of the New Testament while following along in the Scripture text.
- Highlight, bookmark, and take notes on passages
- Share passages with beautiful photos from around Bhutan
- Sync content across devices
- Watch introductory videos for passages to help you understand what you're reading (Nepali only)
